sourcePrompt: An M2 Browning .50 caliber "Ma Deuce" heavy machine gun mounted low on its ground tripod. A massive boxy receiver feeding a thick barrel inside a perforated jacket, more than one and a half meters of gun, with big spade grips and a butterfly trigger at the rear, sitting on a splayed three-legged tripod whose front legs reach forward. Gunmetal gray, brutally industrial, knee-high in stance.
